documents.title: Basic Plan
documents.content: Basic Plan costs $29/month. It includes 10 videos per month, 720p resolution export, and access to standard editing tools. Best for creators just getting started.

documents.title: Pro Plan
documents.content: Pro Plan costs $79/month. It includes unlimited videos, 4K resolution export, AI-powered automatic captions, priority 24/7 support, and real-time collaboration. Best for professional creators and agencies.

documents.title: AI Auto-Editing
documents.content: AutoStream uses AI to automatically edit your raw footage. It detects scenes, removes silences, adds transitions, and produces a polished video with minimal manual effort.

documents.title: AI Captions
documents.content: AutoStream generates accurate AI-powered captions automatically. Available on the Pro Plan only. Supports multiple languages and allows custom styling.

documents.title: Multi-Platform Export
documents.content: Export your videos optimized for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn in one click. AutoStream automatically adjusts aspect ratio and bitrate per platform.

documents.title: Cloud Storage
documents.content: All your video projects are securely stored in the cloud. Access them from any device at any time. Basic Plan includes 50 GB storage; Pro Plan includes 500 GB.

documents.title: Real-Time Collaboration
documents.content: Pro Plan users can invite team members to collaborate on projects in real time. Leave comments, make edits simultaneously, and manage roles with granular permissions.

documents.title: Refund Policy
documents.content: AutoStream offers a 7-day refund window from the date of purchase. No refunds are issued after 7 days. To request a refund, contact support@autostream.ai within the window.

documents.title: Support Policy
documents.content: Basic Plan users receive email support during business hours (Mon–Fri, 9am–6pm EST). Pro Plan users receive priority 24/7 live chat and email support with a 1-hour response SLA.

documents.title: Free Trial
documents.content: AutoStream offers a 7-day free trial on the Pro Plan — no credit card required. After the trial, you are automatically moved to the Basic Plan unless you upgrade.
